addFriendModal.title: ADD FRIEND
addFriendModal.description: You can add friends with their Mezon usernames
addFriendModal.tooltip: You can add friends with their Mezon usernames
addFriendModal.alreadyFriends: You're already friends with that user!
addFriendModal.waitAccept: You have already sent a friend request to this user!
addFriendModal.invalidInput: Please only use numbers, letters, underscores _ or full stops.
addFriendModal.blockedUser: You have blocked this user. Please unblock them before sending a friend request.
addFriendModal.blockedUserMobile: You blocked this user. Unblock to send a friend request.
addFriendModal.waitingMessage: Mezon is waiting on friends. You don't have to, though!

requestFailedPopup.title: Friend request failed
requestFailedPopup.message: You're already friends with that user!

removeFriendModal.title: Remove '{{username}}'
removeFriendModal.description: Are you sure you want to remove <bold>{{username}}</bold> from your friends?

cancelRequestModal.title: Cancel '{{username}}'
cancelRequestModal.description: Are you sure you want to cancel your friend request to <bold>{{username}}</bold>?

rejectRequestModal.title: Reject '{{username}}'
rejectRequestModal.description: Are you sure you want to reject the friend request from <bold>{{username}}</bold>?

statusTapListFriends.all: Looks a little empty here! Let's get this party started by adding a few friends.
statusTapListFriends.online: It's quiet right now! Why not start a conversation and see who's around?
statusTapListFriends.pending: This is where you'll find friend requests you've sent and received.

statusTapSearchFriends.all: No friends match your search. Try another name.
statusTapSearchFriends.online: No one online matches your search. Try another name.
statusTapSearchFriends.pending: No requests match your search. Double-check the name or try again.
statusTapSearchFriends.block: No blocked users match your search. Try another name.
